title: TUBERCULOSIS PROGRAM - 211info
text: NORTH CENTRAL PUBLIC HEALTH DISTRICT TUBERCULOSIS PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Identifies and treats tuberculosis (TB) disease. Screens tuberculosis case contacts and provides medical case management for those who test positive. 419 E 7th Street The Dalles, OR 97058 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday/Wednesday/Friday 8:30am-12pm and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 506-2600 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 506-2600 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: May vary, insurance will be billed if applicable DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Wasco and Sherman counties Services: Case/Care Management * Tuberculosis Tuberculosis Screening Other Services Offered At This Location: CONSUMER REGULATION - FOOD HANDLER CARD ENVIRONMENTAL PROTECTION AND IMPROVEMENT - WATER QUALITY ASSURANCE HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE ENROLLING HUMAN REPRODUCTION - REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - BABIES FIRST! INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CACOON PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM PUBLIC HEALTH - PUBLIC HEALTH LICENSED FACILITY INSPECTIONS SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NORTH CENTRAL PUBLIC HEALTH DISTRICT
